tickets.title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
tickets.description: Customer is unable to login into their account. They've tried resetting their password multiple times but still facing authentication errors.

tickets.title: Unable to Download Invoice
tickets.description: Customer cannot download their invoice without error. The download button triggers a 404 error page.

tickets.title: App Crash on Launch
tickets.description: Customer experiences a crash while launching the app causing an unresponsive system.

tickets.title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
tickets.description: Customer is experiencing issues with two-factor authentication.

tickets.title: Subscription Auto-Renewal
tickets.description: Customer wants to disable automatic renewal for their subscription.

tickets.title: Payment Method Update Failed
tickets.description: Customer cannot update their payment method.

tickets.title: Email Notification Delay
tickets.description: Customer reports delay in receiving notifications.

tickets.title: Password Reset Loop
tickets.description: Customer stuck in password reset loop.

tickets.title: File Upload Size Limit
tickets.description: Cannot upload files under size limit.

tickets.title: Dashboard Loading Slow
tickets.description: Dashboard takes over 30 seconds to load.
